license: CC-BY 4.0 (Anthropic Economic Index); CC BY 4.0 (O*NET, USDOL/ETA); Public Domain (BLS); MIT (Microsoft AI Diffusion Report)
attribution: Anthropic Economic Index (Anthropic, 2025); O*NET 28.3 (U.S. Department of Labor/ETA); BLS Employment Statistics (U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics, 2023); Microsoft AI Diffusion Report Q1 2026 (Microsoft, MIT license)

sources.name: Microsoft AI Diffusion Report — AI Economic Impact & Insights (AIEI), Q1 2026
sources.usedFor: diffusionPct (Q1 2026, back-compat), diffusionTrend (H1 2025 / H2 2025 / Q1 2026), and diffusionDelta (pp change H1 2025 → Q1 2026) on CountryMapDatum: % of working-age population using generative AI, three-period time series, 147 economies including China (H1 16.4%, H2 16.3%, Q1 16.4%). COMPARABILITY CAVEAT: behavior-based survey %; different denominator than Claude.ai usageIndex (observed API sessions). Do NOT merge. Western telemetry may undercount China’s domestic apps (e.g. Doubao, Kimi) — CNNIC reports ~43% genAI penetration vs 16.4% here.

sources.name: IMF AI Preparedness Index (AIPI) — overall composite score (AI_PI) and sub-indices
sources.usedFor: aiReadiness on CountryMapDatum: overall AI preparedness composite score 0–1 for 178 countries (2023 vintage, indicator AI_PI). readinessSubIndices on CountryMapDatum: four pillar sub-index scores (0–1) — DI=Digital Infrastructure (~186 countries), HCLMP=Human Capital & Labor Market Policies (~186 countries), IEI=Innovation & Economic Integration (~180 countries), RE=Regulation & Ethics (~187 countries). API endpoints: https://www.imf.org/external/datamapper/api/v1/AIPI/AI_PI (composite); /AIPI/DI, /AIPI/HCLMP, /AIPI/IEI, /AIPI/RE (sub-indices). COMPARABILITY CAVEAT: capacity/infrastructure readiness metrics, NOT user-behavior %; different denominator than diffusionPct or usageIndex. Do NOT merge or average with those metrics.

sources.name: Anthropic Economic Index — Job Exposure
sources.usedFor: Primary AI-exposure metric (observed_exposure) per SOC occupation — replaces Frey-Osborne 2013

sources.name: Anthropic Economic Index — Wage & Forecast Data
sources.usedFor: Median salary fallback, job forecast, job zone, bright outlook, sector (JobFamily)

sources.name: BLS Occupational Employment and Wage Statistics (OEWS) via BLS Public Data API (api.bls.gov)
sources.usedFor: per-occupation employment + median wage (authoritative; overrides AEI bundle when BLS_API_KEY set)

sources.name: Anthropic Economic Index — BLS Employment May 2023
sources.license: CC-BY 4.0 (derived); BLS original is public domain
sources.usedFor: Employment totals by occupation (legacy fallback — superseded by OEWS API when key is set)

sources.name: Anthropic Economic Index — Country AI Adoption (Aug 2025)
sources.usedFor: Per-country AI usage index, usage %, usage count, GDP per working-age capita

sources.name: World Bank Open Data — China GDP and Working-Age Population
sources.usedFor: Supplemental China GDP per working-age capita when Anthropic country usage metrics are not reported

sources.name: Eurostat — Artificial intelligence by size class of enterprise
sources.usedFor: Supplemental multi-country enterprise AI adoption rate for European reporting countries

sources.name: OECD ICT Access and Usage Database
sources.usedFor: Supplemental enterprise AI adoption and individual generative-AI usage rates by reporting country

sources.name: U.S. Census Annual Business Survey — Technology Characteristics of Businesses
sources.usedFor: Supplemental U.S. employer-firm artificial-intelligence total-use counts and percentages

sources.name: QuestMobile 2025 AI Application Ranking coverage
sources.usedFor: Secondary-source China-native AI app MAU figures for Doubao and DeepSeek

sources.usedFor: Supplemental open-model download and like-count proxies for Qwen, DeepSeek, Kimi, ChatGLM, and Baichuan

sources.name: Natural Earth / world-atlas@2 — 110m Country Polygons (TopoJSON)
sources.publisher: Natural Earth / Mike Bostock (world-atlas npm package)
sources.usedFor: World map choropleth geometry — country polygons at 110m resolution, Antarctica dropped; numeric ISO ids mapped to ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 via lukes/ISO-3166-Countries-with-Regional-Codes crosswalk. AEI usageIndex primary choropleth value; proxy context shown for restricted countries (e.g. China).

sources.name: ISO 3166-1 Country Codes Crosswalk (lukes/ISO-3166-Countries-with-Regional-Codes)
sources.usedFor: Numeric ISO 3166-1 → alpha-3 mapping used to annotate world-atlas country features

note: automationRisk bands are percentile-calibrated from the aiExposure distribution (756 occupations): Very High = top ~8% (aiExposure > 0.3104), High = next ~12% (> 0.1378), Medium = next ~25% (> 0.0080), Low = remainder (≤ 0.0080). aiExposure = observed_exposure from Anthropic Economic Index (Claude AI-usage based, not Frey-Osborne 2013). employment: real OEWS 2025 figures (755 occupations updated via BLS Public Data API). medianSalary: OEWS 2025 where available (752 updated), AEI-bundled wage otherwise. growthRate is null (no authoritative per-SOC % growth in AEI files). projectedOpenings from wage_data.JobForecast (BLS-EP annual openings) where > 0. China is included as a supplemental country row with World Bank 2024 GDP per working-age capita; Anthropic Claude.ai usage metrics for China are not reported and remain null. O*NET skills: successfully loaded
